untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'Belt Hold' candlestick pattern and position relative to yearly low (within third of yearly low). These require custom pattern recognition and multi-timeframe yearly extrema calculation not available in indicator set. The exact body_pct threshold for 'closes near top' is also author-silent. Performance data shows median exit around 7 days with ~2% average rise, but precise entry pattern cannot be structurally defined.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate with body_pct > 0.70 (close near top of candle range), but this is insufficient without the yearly low context and pattern confirmation. The signal is fundamentally dependent on candlestick morphology and yearly extrema not expressible through standard technical indicators.
